svg.text: kv_ingress_injector.csl — KV-cache ingress switch column (host -> block, WEST scatter)
Mirror of prefill kv_egress_colmux, reversed. Working tree of lexu/staging/s6a-inner-pe-kv-route-a: KV_META_LEN 2->4, n_segs_rt==0 retain fast-path.
(1) Spatial layout — per-band staircase, free column EAST of the block (2x2 config: 2 bands, P_BLOCK_SIZE=8)
col c keeps tile c, fwds rest W
each PE peels its meta copy:
-> row k+1 passes PE k at the ROUTER,
Each non-tail PE then clears its switch
Colors: in_color (region-alloc, IQ2, switch N->RAMP | N->SOUTH) - scatter_color = kv_ingress_color_0 (17) or _1 (21) by east-column parity, OQ3, RAMP->WEST - round_sync (IQ3 / OQ4).
Ids 17/21 are reused from kpipe_b k7 / UP_A_color, which live on strip & HT_head cells — PE-disjoint from the block columns (launch.py:623-626).
(2) The per-round meta tile's journey — S6a widened KV_META_LEN 2 -> 4
num_cols = Pw * KV_META_LEN / 2 = 2*Pw = 32 u32 (was Pw = 16 at fcfc8c1) | metablk extent num_cols-1 : 15 -> 31
PEELS u32 #0, reads ONLY low 16 (plen). @as(u16,u32) truncates away decode_len.
RE-EMITS it, relays the other 31 metas verbatim. Blind to decode_len / retained_len.
PEELS u32 #0, reads ONLY low 16 (plen) -> n_segs_rt = D_kv * plen (:85).
RE-EMITS it (:87), forwards 31 metas WEST (:91). Peel is wavelet-count-neutral.
Receives all 4 i16 slots: plen (:1577), decode_len (:1578), retained_len (:1579).
DERIVES retain_rt = (plen == 0) on-device (:1580) — no retain flag is ever transmitted.
(3) Per-PE task state machine — is_col_tail selects the post-row branch
never left pos0 -> no reset needed
re-arm peel_meta0 for the next round's row
Retain round = META-ONLY: 32 meta u32, ZERO KV. Skip the segment move entirely and
jump straight to round-sync. Old code did ONE unconditional mov32 -> phantom seg_len read
+ undrained wavelets on the ingress color -> round-1 IQ7 remap FATAL at the broadcast rebind.
The switch still advances and round_sync still fires EXACTLY ONCE per row —
only the data move is elided. Count-exactness holds because the adaptor carries the
twin fast-path (kv_ingress_adaptor.csl:82-92): both ends compute n_segs_rt = 0.
Runtime COUNT x comptime LENGTH: seg_len is comptime (<= 32766; >= 0x7fff = INFINITE_DSD_LEN hangs silently). A mis-timed SWITCH_ADV or a count mismatch is a SILENT HANG, not an error.
